bridge_functions.name: Camera.GetPhoto
bridge_functions.description: Capture a photo with the device camera

parameters.id: optional string — ID to track this capture
parameters.event: optional string — custom event class to fire

watermark.description: optional object — overlay a text watermark on the captured photo
watermark.position: optional string — bottom-right (default), bottom-left, top-right, top-left, center
watermark.size: optional number — font size in px/pt (default: 48)

bridge_functions.name: Camera.RecordVideo
bridge_functions.description: Record a video with the device camera

bridge_functions.name: Camera.PickMedia
bridge_functions.description: Pick media from the device gallery

info_plist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires camera access to take photos and videos.
info_plist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app requires microphone access to record video with audio.
info_plist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires photo library access to select media.
